mapper.sql: id, role_code, role_name, permission, level, data_scope, create_by, create_time, remark
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_role ORDER BY level, id

SELECT r.id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.permission, r.level, r.data_scope, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.remark FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.level
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role (role_code, role_name, permission, level, data_scope, create_by, remark) VALUES (#{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{permission}, #{level}, #{dataScope}, #{createBy}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET role_name = #{roleName}, permission = #{permission}, level = #{level}, data_scope = #{dataScope}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM sys_role
AND (role_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filter.keyword}, '%') OR role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filter.keyword}, '%'))
AND level = #{filter.level}
ORDER BY
role_code role_name level create_time id
DESC ASC
LIMIT #{filter.offset}, #{filter.size}

SELECT r.id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.permission, r.level, r.data_scope, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.remark FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON r.id = rm.role_id WHERE rm.menu_id = #{menuId} ORDER BY r.level
